case_title: DEBORA M KHAW VS. JEFFREY DING

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHAW, DEBORA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY $5,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,750.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,900.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00- SERVED MAY-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, (AMENDED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAW, DEBORA M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY KHAW, DEBORA M AS TO DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (CERTIFIED MAIL: SERVED) FILED BY DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY SERVED OCT-07-2015, MAIL AS TO PLAINTIFF KHAW, DEBORA M
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY KHAW, DEBORA M DING, JEFFREY

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JEFFREY DING ON OCT-16-2015 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHAW, DEBORA M AS TO DEFENDANT DING, JEFFREY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $73.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF KHAW, DEBORA M
